mechanism_narrative: Quarterly real GDP growth exceeding the historical median compresses equity risk premiums by confirming stable corporate earnings trajectories, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in high-growth quarters are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rapid decline in the unemployment rate signals tightening labor markets that boost consumer spending power and corporate revenue growth, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns within one week.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5-day returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite falling unemployment, or the signal loses predictive power after controlling for FEDFUNDS changes.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in housing starts and industrial production indicate synchronized real-economy expansion, which amplifies equity valuations through rising capex cycles and positive forward returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to outperform a single-proxy baseline in out-of-sample testing, or forward returns turn negative when housing starts decline while industrial production rises.

mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rates combined with accelerating consumer price inflation compress equity multiples by increasing the discount rate and eroding real profit margins, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Equity multiples expand despite simultaneous rate hikes and inflation acceleration, or the combined signal yields a negative Rank IC over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp contraction in retail sales volume signals weakening consumer demand that directly threatens corporate top-line growth, triggering negative S&P 500 forward returns within one week.
failure_condition: SPX generates positive 5-day returns in > 55% of triggered instances despite falling retail sales, or the signal shows no statistical significance after adjusting for seasonal factors.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in the industrial production index reflects expanding manufacturing capacity and supply chain efficiency, which supports corporate earnings and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over a quarterly horizon.
failure_condition: Industrial production growth correlates negatively with forward equity returns across multiple market cycles, or the signal fails to predict returns beyond a 10% accuracy threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Rapid nonfarm payroll growth paired with accelerating consumer price inflation indicates a wage-price spiral that forces aggressive monetary tightening, ultimately suppressing equity valuations and generating negative forward returns.
failure_condition: The joint signal produces positive equity returns when both employment and inflation surge, or the interaction term shows no statistical significance in a multivariate regression framework.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts exceeding the 1100 thousand unit threshold signals robust builder confidence and downstream economic activity, which catalyzes positive S&P 500 forward returns within one week.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5-day returns in > 60% of instances where housing starts exceed 1100 thousand units, or the signal loses predictive power when interest rates rise above 4.0%.
